basic_details.job_title: DHS Salem Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 18 DEO, Staff Nurse and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Medical Officer, Psychiatric Social Worker (De Addiction Centre), Staff Nurse (MLHP), Health Inspector, ANM, Data Entry Operator (DEO), Hospital Worker/Support staff
basic_details.short_information: District Health Society Salem has officially announced the Medical Officer, Psychiatric Social Worker, Staff Nurse (MLHP), Health Inspector, ANM, Data Entry Operator (DEO), Hospital Worker/Support Staff Recruitment 2026 with 18 openings. The detailed notification has been released for eligible candidates with qualifications including MBBS, M.A Social Work, DGNM/B.Sc Nursing, 12th with Biology/Botany/Zoology, Any Degree with PG Diploma in Computer Application, and 8th Standard. Candidates who meet the age criteria of below 40 years can submit their applications through offline mode on or before

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: The maximum age limit for all posts is 40 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS, M.A Social Work, DGNM/B.Sc Nursing, 12th with Biology/Botany/Zoology, Any Degree with PG Diploma in Computer Application, 8th Standard
qualification.details: Medical Officer: MBBS Degree awarded by University or Recognised Institution, Course must have been approved by Medical Council of India/NMC, Registered in Tamil Nadu Medical Council. Psychiatric Social Worker: M.A Social Work (Medical and Psychiatry) / Master of Social Work (Medical and Psychiatry), 6 months training at Identified Institutions. Staff Nurse (MLHP): Diploma in General Nursing and Midwifery (DGNM) or B.Sc., Nursing, Institution recognized by the Indian Nursing council. Health Inspector: +2 with Biology or Botany and Zoology, Tamil Language as a subject in S.S.L.C. Level, Two years for Multi-purpose Health Worker(Male) / Health Inspector/ Sanitary Inspector Course Training / Offered by recognized private institution/ Trust/ Universities/ Deemed Universities (including Gandigram rural Institute Training Course Certificate granted by the Directorate of Public Health and Preventive Medicine). ANM: 2 Years ANM Course in Recognised Institution. Data Entry Operator (DEO): Any degree, 1 Year PG Diploma Computer application Type Writing in English & Tamil (Lower). Hospital Worker/Support staff: Minimum 8th standard, Must be able to read.

salary_details.details: Medical Officer: Rs. 63,000/- Psychiatric Social Worker (De Addiction Centre): Rs. 27,000/- Staff Nurse (MLHP): Rs. 21,000/- Health Inspector: Rs. 17,500/- ANM: Rs. 17,500/- Data Entry Operator (DEO): Rs. 17,500/- Hospital Worker/Support staff: Rs. 11,000/-

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DHS Salem Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://www.salem.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DHS Salem Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the DHS Salem Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download DHS Salem Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: DHS Salem Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Medical Officer: MBBS Degree awarded by University or Recognised Institution, Course must have been approved by Medical Council of India/NMC, Registered in Tamil Nadu Medical Council. Psychiatric Social Worker: M.A Social Work (Medical and Psychiatry) / Master of Social Work (Medical and Psychiatry), 6 months training at Identified Institutions. Staff Nurse (MLHP): Diploma in General Nursing and Midwifery (DGNM) or B.Sc., Nursing, Institution recognized by the Indian Nursing council. Health Inspector: +2 with Biology or Botany and Zoology, Tamil Language as a subject in S.S.L.C. Level, Two years for Multi-purpose Health Worker(Male) / Health Inspector/ Sanitary Inspector Course Training / Offered by recognized private institution/ Trust/ Universities/ Deemed Universities (including Gandigram rural Institute Training Course Certificate granted by the Directorate of Public Health and Preventive Medicine). ANM: 2 Years ANM Course in Recognised Institution. Data Entry Operator (DEO): Any degree, 1 Year PG Diploma Computer application Type Writing in English & Tamil (Lower). Hospital Worker/Support staff: Minimum 8th standard, Must be able to read.

content_sections.heading: DHS Salem Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: DHS Salem Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: The maximum age limit for all posts is 40 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: DHS Salem Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Medical Officer: Rs. 63,000/- Psychiatric Social Worker (De Addiction Centre): Rs. 27,000/- Staff Nurse (MLHP): Rs. 21,000/- Health Inspector: Rs. 17,500/- ANM: Rs. 17,500/- Data Entry Operator (DEO): Rs. 17,500/- Hospital Worker/Support staff: Rs. 11,000/-

content_sections.heading: DHS Salem Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DHS Salem Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://www.salem.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for DHS Salem Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the various posts at District Health Society Salem is 20th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in DHS Salem Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 18 vacancies announced for various posts under the District Health Society Salem recruitment drive for the year 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Hospital Worker post?
faq.answer: For the Hospital Worker/Support Staff position, the minimum educational qualification required is having studied at least 8th standard and the ability to read.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for all the posts announced by District Health Society Salem is below 40 years. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for DHS Salem Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for the District Health Society Salem recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: The selected Medical Officer will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 63,000/- as per the District Health Society Salem recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates from other states apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification specifies registration in Tamil Nadu Medical Council for Medical Officers, implying a preference for candidates with local affiliations. Other posts' eligibility should be checked in the detailed notification.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant educational certificates with their application form.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for DHS Salem Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: As per the information available, there is no application fee mentioned for any category in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Health Society Salem, which is https://www.salem.nic.in.
